extension.summary: [COLOR red]Installs binaries for The Red Wizard Live and Redflix TOTAL Kodi 21 Omega builds[/COLOR]
extension.description: [COLOR red]Installs binary addons on install and update: "inputstream.adaptive", "inputstream.ffmpegdirect", "inputstream.rtmp" and "pvr.iptvsimple"[/COLOR]
extension.news: [COLOR red]2026-02-25 - Now a standalone plug-in (not a dependency) - Updated import pvr.iptvsimple version[/COLOR]
